tests.source_program:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
#0:
  %max = umax i32 %a, %b
  %min = umin i32 %a, %b
  %res = icmp eq i32 %min, %max
  ret i1 %res
}

issue.title: [instcombine] fold icmp eq/ne (min a, b), (max a, b) to icmp eq/ne a, b
issue.body:
also symmetric selects/phi

```
----------------------------------------
define i1 @src(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
#0:
  %max = umax i32 %a, %b
  %min = umin i32 %a, %b
  %res = icmp eq i32 %min, %max
  ret i1 %res
}
=>
define i1 @tgt(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
#0:
  %res = icmp eq i32 %a, %b
  ret i1 %res
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
```
@dtcxzyw extension to 0ce193708cb682f3ad742ad909d8a5346a505ac7
issue.author: sftlbcn

comments.author: pinskia
comments.body:
Note the rest of the comparisons:

`MIN (a, b) <= MAX (a, b)` should be simplified down to true.
`MIN (a, b) > MAX (a, b)` should be simplified down to false.

`MIN (a, b) < MAX (a, b)` should be simplified down to `a != b`
`MIN (a, b) >= MAX (a, b)` should be simplified down to `a == b`

Assuming the same signedness of MIN/MAX and the comparison.

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:

> 
> `MIN (a, b) < MAX (a, b)` should be simplified down to `a != b` `MIN (a, b) >= MAX (a, b)` should be simplified down to `a == b`
> 
> Assuming the same signedness of MIN/MAX and the comparison.

Please file a separate issue for these simplifications.
